race.description: Cvlx Miners Rest Community Cup (Bm66) Hcp
race.comment: COLOUR OUR WORLD (7) on top. She's racing well, coming right away to win easily at Geelong two back as favourite before a tough effort at Warrnambool last time when boxing on gamely for second. Drawn wide here but if she can push forward and get into a spot she'll go close. HIGH TEMPO (10) is in fine form, close up her past couple, staying on well over 1700m at Warrnambool last time with some decent form out of that race. Up a bit n trip here should suit nicely. BREATHLESS SPIRIT (2) improved nicely second up here to score in BM62 company. Finds another suitable race and should strip fitter again. BUZZAROON (3) is likely to add some value if he can improve on his Warrnambool performance last start.
